title: Mount Tomuraushi
summary:
Mount Tomuraushi may refer to:

Mount Tomuraushi (Daisetsuzan), in Daisetsuzan National Park in Hokkaidō
Mount Tomuraushi (Hidaka), in the Hidaka Mountains of Hokkaido
